classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为完整图纸中绿色框选的侧面视图，包含外形轮廓、剖面/侧面结构线、尺寸箭头和标注，如'Φ103.6'、'Φ99.6'、'50'、'49.4'、'41'、'79'、'25.5'、'6'以及'力测量原点'引出线，表达零部件侧向安装和外形尺寸关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为背面安装面视图，包含圆形法兰轮廓、中心孔、均布安装孔、引出线和尺寸标注，可见'φ83'、'φ16 +0.018 0 ▽2.5'、'6 x M8 ▽ 6 (均布)'、'2X φ5 +0.012 0 ▽5'等孔径、公差、深度和均布孔位信息，属于机械结构安装尺寸。

translation_notes: Back Side translated as 背面视图.

Callout is visually a diameter dimension with upper/lower tolerance and depth symbol; one tolerance value relies on a noisy broad OCR box.

Lower callout identifies two small precision holes with diameter, unilateral tolerance, and depth; several OCR fragments are noisy but align with the visible annotation.
Text is a view label rather than a dimensional feature.

Duplicate sub-fragment of the depth callout already represented by ocr_007.
Small isolated character inside drawing geometry; no clear independent engineering label.
Overlapping erroneous OCR near M8 callout; visible annotation is 6 x M8.
Overlapping erroneous OCR across the M8 callout; visible annotation is 6 x M8 ▽ 6.
Small noisy fragment near lower depth symbol; not reliable as independent text.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为紫框内的等轴测机械结构视图，显示圆柱本体、法兰、安装孔、螺纹孔、沉孔和侧面接插件外形位置；结合完整标注图可知其对应传感器安装结构和孔位布置，没有针脚功能、线色或接线定义，也不是扭矩转速曲线。

title.title_zh: 传感器安装结构等轴测图

terminology_notes: Target crop contains only the 3D/isometric mechanical structure view; OCR detections correspond to holes, edges, fasteners, circular features, or drawing lines rather than reliable text.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Not specified in target crop text; visible geometry suggests mounting features but no reliable OCR text annotation is available.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: All detected OCR source boxes in the target crop appear to be non-text geometry misrecognitions, so no usable engineering text annotations or dimension records are retained.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR detections appear to be false positives from circular holes, fasteners, outlines, connector geometry, or structural lines rather than actual visible text in IMAGE 1.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
